This PR annotate `OVERLAY(expr)` for **`Spark`**/**`DBX`**

```sql
SELECT typeof(overlay('Spark SQL' PLACING '_' FROM 6)) as one, typeof(overlay(encode('Spark SQL', 'utf-8') PLACING encode('ANSI ', 'utf-8') FROM 6)) as two;
```

```python
|one|two|
|---|---|
|string|binary|
```

https://spark.apache.org/docs/latest/api/sql/index.html#overlay
https://docs.databricks.com/aws/en/sql/language-manual/functions/overlay
